hero.headline: A considered selection of iconic watches.
hero.subheadline: Rolex, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe references, prepared in Montreal with tracked delivery, 30-day returns, and direct guidance when it is time to choose.

collections.headline: Start with the maison that speaks to you.
collections.subheadline: Choose the house that draws you in first, then compare the references that define the Artemis selection.

why.headline: A more personal way to shop watches.
why.subheadline: A focused catalogue, careful preparation, and direct service from Montreal.
why.p1Body: We focus on four maisons: Rolex, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe. Each piece is chosen for design coherence, condition, and overall presence on the wrist.
why.p2Body: Every watch is reviewed before shipment for case condition, crystal clarity, bracelet feel, and overall finish. Only pieces that meet our standard are prepared for delivery.
why.p3Body: Artemis is based in Montreal and designed to feel direct. You can message us on WhatsApp, speak with our team, or arrange a private viewing locally.
why.p4Body: If the piece is not right for you, return it within 30 days in its original condition for a full refund. Clear terms, no hidden restocking fees.
why.p5Body: Message us on WhatsApp for a direct answer from the Artemis team during business hours.
why.p6Body: Every order comes with a bracelet adjustment tool, protective presentation packaging, tracked shipping, and an optional box & papers set.

range.headline: Two ranges, one considered standard.
range.subheadline: Choose the range that fits your budget and the level of finish you want on the wrist.
range.essentialBody: The Essential Range is built for clients who want strong design, balanced proportions, and an easy way into the Artemis catalogue.
range.premiumBody: The Premium Range is suited to clients who want a more detailed finish, a richer material feel, and a stronger presence on the wrist.
range.sharedNote: Both ranges include the same inspection process, direct support, and tracked delivery.
range.essentialBestFor: Best for: first piece, daily wear, clean everyday presence
range.premiumBestFor: Best for: collectors, milestone gifts, stronger finish and materials
range.whatsappNote: Not sure which range? Our team can help you compare.

bestSellers.headline: Start with the pieces clients ask for most
bestSellers.subheadline: A simple way to compare presence, sizing, and range before you choose your piece.

testimonials.headline: A clear experience from first message to delivery.
testimonials.subheadline: Client notes return to the same points: accurate descriptions, direct guidance, and tracked delivery through to arrival.
testimonials.ugcCaption: Feedback that helps you order with more confidence.

reviews.text: I was hesitant to buy a watch online, but Artemis handled everything clearly. The Submariner arrived as described, well packed, and the WhatsApp follow-up was quick and helpful.
reviews.author: Marc D.

reviews.text: I ordered the Datejust for my husband's birthday. The presentation felt considered and the watch looked exactly as shown. The 30-day return policy made the purchase easier to place with confidence.
reviews.author: Sarah L.

reviews.text: The Royal Oak from the Premium range has real presence on the wrist. Shipping was fast, communication was clear, and the overall experience felt well handled.
reviews.author: James K.

reviews.text: As a watch collector, I pay attention to details. Artemis was straightforward in the description and the Santos I received matched the listing closely.
reviews.author: David R.

testimonials.whatsappText: Have a question about a specific piece? Our team responds directly.

faq.headline: The answers that matter before you order
faq.subheadline: Shipping, returns, secure payment, and direct guidance: the essentials for deciding with confidence.
faq.a1: Canadian orders typically arrive in 3 to 7 business days. International orders usually take 7 to 14 days. All orders ship with tracking.
faq.a2: Yes. We ship across Canada and to most international destinations. Costs appear before payment.
faq.a3: You have 30 days to return the piece in its original condition if it is not right for you.
faq.a4: Yes. Stripe secure checkout is used throughout, and shipping, taxes, plus any duties appear before you confirm payment.
faq.q5: Can I speak with someone before ordering?
faq.a5: Yes. Message us on WhatsApp and we can help you compare ranges, sizes, or references before you order.
faq.q6: What is included with my order?
faq.a6: The watch, a bracelet adjustment tool, protective packaging, and tracked shipping.

reviewsList.text: I was hesitant about buying a watch online, but Artemis handled the process clearly. The Submariner arrived as described, well packaged, and the WhatsApp replies were quick throughout.
reviewsList.author: Marc D.

reviewsList.text: I ordered the Datejust for my husband's birthday. The presentation felt refined and the watch looked exactly as shown. The 30-day return policy made the purchase feel straightforward.
reviewsList.author: Sarah L.

reviewsList.text: The Royal Oak from the Premium range has excellent wrist presence. Shipping was fast, communication was clear, and the bracelet tool was a useful addition.
reviewsList.author: James K.

reviewsList.text: As a collector, I pay attention to details. Artemis was honest in the description and the Santos I received matched the listing closely.
reviewsList.author: David R.

reviewsList.text: A smooth experience from start to finish. The Nautilus arrived in excellent condition and the packaging felt discreet and well considered. I would order again.
reviewsList.author: Philippe M.

reviewsList.text: I reached out on WhatsApp before buying. The team was knowledgeable, transparent about condition, and helped me narrow down the right piece for my budget.
reviewsList.author: Emma T.

reviewsList.text: The Panthère de Cartier I ordered looked elegant in person and matched the photos well. The experience felt polished from order confirmation to delivery.
reviewsList.author: Isabelle F.

reviewsList.text: Quick delivery and no friction. The watch arrived with the bracelet tool, which I used the same day, and communication stayed clear at every stage.
reviewsList.author: Ryan B.

reviewsList.text: I've bought from a few online watch sellers and Artemis felt especially organised. The photos were accurate, shipping was prompt, and the follow-up support was real.
reviewsList.author: Nathan C.

reviewsList.text: This was a gift for my partner's 30th birthday. The presentation was clean, the packaging felt secure, and the watch was exactly as described.
reviewsList.author: Luc B.

reviewsList.text: Very happy with my Datejust. I confirmed the details on WhatsApp, paid through the site, and received the watch in excellent condition within five days.
reviewsList.author: Alex V.

reviewsList.text: I appreciated the transparency. They explained what was included, the condition of the dial, and helped me compare two models without any pressure.
reviewsList.author: Sophie M.

faqPage.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions about ARTEMIS. Shipping, returns, product quality, payments, and more.
faqPage.heroBody: Everything you need to know about ordering, shipping, returns, and payment.
faqPage.stillHaveQBody: Reach us on WhatsApp during business hours for direct guidance.
faqPage.s1a1: Canadian orders typically arrive in 3–7 business days via tracked courier. International orders take 7–14 business days. All orders include a tracking number sent to your email upon dispatch.
faqPage.s1a2: Yes. We ship to most countries worldwide. International shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on destination. Some restrictions may apply — contact us on WhatsApp if you are unsure.
faqPage.s1a3: Free shipping is available on all Canadian orders. International shipping costs vary by destination and are shown at checkout.
faqPage.s1a4: Absolutely. Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a tracking number by email. You can track your shipment in real-time through the courier's website.
faqPage.s1a5: Each watch is packed in a discreet protective box. The exterior never indicates the contents.
faqPage.s2a1: If the piece is not right for you, you may return it within 30 days according to our return policy. No hidden restocking fees.
faqPage.s2q2: How do I initiate a return?
faqPage.s2a2: Simply contact us on WhatsApp or by email at hello@artemis-watches.com within 30 days of receiving your order. We will send you a prepaid return label and process your refund within 5–7 business days.
faqPage.s2q3: In what condition should I return the watch?
faqPage.s2a3: The watch should be returned in the same condition as received — unworn or worn only for inspection — with all original packaging included.
faqPage.s2q4: How long does a refund take?
faqPage.s2a4: Once we receive and inspect the returned watch, refunds are processed within 5–7 business days. The amount will appear on your original payment method.
faqPage.s3a1: Every watch is individually inspected by our team before listing and again before shipment. We check case integrity, crystal clarity, bracelet tension, crown function, and overall cosmetic finish. Only pieces that meet our standard are offered for sale.
faqPage.s3a2: We focus on four maisons: Rolex, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe, with a catalogue built around a concise set of emblematic models.
faqPage.s3q3: What is the difference between Essential and Premium ranges?
faqPage.s3a3: The Essential Range ($300–$350 CAD) offers a lighter entry point. The Premium Range ($900–$1,600 CAD) offers more detailed finishing and a stronger material feel. Both follow the same inspection process.
faqPage.s3q4: Do the watches come with box and papers?
faqPage.s3a4: A box & papers accessory set is available as an optional add-on for $49 CAD at checkout on eligible pieces.
faqPage.s3q5: What is included with every order?
faqPage.s3a5: Each ARTEMIS order includes the watch, a bracelet adjustment tool, protective presentation packaging, and tracked shipping with signature confirmation.
faqPage.s3q6: Can I see the watch in person before buying?
faqPage.s3a6: Yes. Montreal-based clients can arrange a private in-person viewing. Contact us on WhatsApp at 514-560-9765 to schedule an appointment.
faqPage.s4q1: What payment methods do you accept?
faqPage.s4a1: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), Apple Pay, Google Pay, and other methods available through our Stripe checkout. All payments are processed securely.
faqPage.s4a2: Yes. Payments are processed securely through Stripe. ARTEMIS never stores your credit card information.
faqPage.s4a3: Installment options (4x payments) are available at checkout through eligible payment methods. The option will appear automatically if your order and payment method qualify.
faqPage.s4a4: PayPal is not currently available at checkout, but you can pay securely with Visa, Mastercard, or any card supported by Stripe.
faqPage.s5q1: How does the 10% welcome code work?
faqPage.s5a1: Create an account and your one-time 10% welcome code is sent by email. It can be applied on a first order.
faqPage.s5q2: Can I use my welcome code more than once?
faqPage.s5a2: No. Each welcome code is unique and valid for one order only. Once used, it expires automatically.
faqPage.s5q3: I created an account but did not receive my welcome code — what do I do?
faqPage.s5a3: Check your spam or junk folder first. If the code is not there within a few minutes, contact us at hello@artemis-watches.com or on WhatsApp.
faqPage.s5q4: Can I combine my welcome code with other offers?
faqPage.s5a4: Welcome codes cannot be combined with other active offers. They apply to the product price before shipping.

about.metaDescription: Learn about ARTEMIS, a Montreal-based watch boutique focused on a curated catalogue, careful preparation, and direct service.
about.heroBody: ARTEMIS was founded by watch enthusiasts who wanted a more direct way to shop considered watch designs. The goal was simple: a focused catalogue, honest presentation, and service that feels personal from first contact to delivery.
about.storyHeadline1: We do not try to show everything.
about.storyHeadline2: We focus on what deserves space.
about.storyP1: Every watch in the Artemis catalogue is selected, reviewed, and prepared with care before it reaches a client. We favour a tighter selection over volume and clear presentation over exaggerated promises.
about.storyP2: That is why we stay focused on four maisons — Rolex, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe — and on pieces that feel coherent within the Artemis point of view.
about.storyQuote: A good watch does not need exaggeration. It needs proportion, presence, and the right context.
about.v1Body: We work within a focused catalogue of Rolex, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe. Each piece is selected for design quality, condition, and overall coherence.
about.v2Body: Every watch is reviewed before shipment for case condition, crystal clarity, bracelet feel, and overall finish.
about.v3Body: Artemis is run from Montreal, with direct communication and private viewings available locally.
about.v4Body: If the watch is not right for you, return it within 30 days in its original condition for a full refund.
about.montrealBody: Artemis operates from Montreal. Local clients can arrange a private viewing, and orders ship across Canada and internationally with tracking.
about.ctaReadyLabel: Ready to find your next timepiece?

contact.metaDescription: Contact ARTEMIS by WhatsApp, email, or for a private viewing in Montreal.
contact.subheadline: WhatsApp is the quickest way to reach us. Email is answered within one business day. Artemis is based in Montréal and private viewings can be arranged locally.
contact.formHeadline: Prefer email? We'll respond within one business day.
contact.formBody: Use this form for general enquiries, product questions, or private-viewing requests. If you need a quicker answer, WhatsApp is best.
contact.basedInValue: Montréal, Québec, Canada · Shipping across Canada & worldwide

rolex.description: For more than a century, Rolex has stood for restraint, precision, and a clear design language. At Artemis, Rolex represents enduring confidence and an ease that translates well across settings.

cartier.description: Cartier balances watchmaking discipline with unmistakable style. From the architectural Santos to the more precious Panthere, each piece carries a Parisian elegance that feels refined without trying too hard. It is the house for clients who want distinction, form, and poise in equal measure.

audemars-piguet.description: With the Royal Oak, Audemars Piguet helped redefine the luxury sports watch. The octagonal bezel, tapisserie dial, and integrated bracelet create a silhouette that feels bolder and more architectural on the wrist.

patek-philippe.tagline: You Never Actually Own a Patek Philippe
patek-philippe.description: Patek Philippe occupies a distinct place in modern watch culture. The Nautilus and Aquanaut combine prestige, restraint, and a quiet design confidence that continues to resonate over time.

submariner.description: The dive watch that moved well beyond diving. Since 1953, the Submariner has remained a reference point for robust proportions, legibility, and everyday versatility.

datejust.description: A Rolex mainstay since 1945. The Datejust pairs familiar proportions with an easy elegance that feels at home in both formal and everyday settings.

gmt-master-ii.description: Designed for pilots and frequent travellers. The bi-colour bezel and dual-time display give the GMT-Master II a practical function and an immediately recognizable silhouette.

daytona.description: Rolex's racing chronograph, shaped by motorsport heritage and a highly recognizable dial layout. The Daytona remains one of the house's most discussed modern references.

santos.description: The world's first aviator's watch, designed in 1904 for Alberto Santos-Dumont. Architectural, bold, and unmistakably Cartier — over a century of pioneering spirit.

panthere.description: A distinctly Cartier expression of jewellery watch design. The Panthère's articulated bracelet and square case give it a soft, refined presence on the wrist.

royal-oak.description: Gerald Genta's 1972 design that helped define the modern luxury sports watch. The octagonal bezel and tapisserie dial still feel sharp, architectural, and instantly familiar.

nautilus.description: A modern reference defined by its porthole-inspired case and horizontally embossed dial. The Nautilus balances restraint, prestige, and a distinctive integrated-sports silhouette.

aquanaut.description: Patek's adventurous spirit in watch form. The rounded octagonal case and composite strap give the Aquanaut a bold modernity unique in the Patek catalogue.
